vendor_identity.name: ServiceChannel
vendor_identity.summary: ServiceChannel work order, dispatch, provider, asset, invoice, and facilities service management APIs exposed through the ServiceChannel developer platform.

catalog_seed_entries.title: Work Orders API
catalog_seed_entries.summary: Work order lifecycle APIs for searching, creating, scheduling, reprioritizing, dispatching, and resolving repair orders in ServiceChannel from ServiceNow operational workflows.

catalog_seed_entries.title: Service Requests API
catalog_seed_entries.summary: Service request intake and pre-dispatch APIs for creating, updating, categorizing, reassigning, and searching incoming repair requests before or alongside work order creation.

catalog_seed_entries.title: Providers API
catalog_seed_entries.summary: Provider network APIs for creating provider records, retrieving provider details, ranking providers, managing dispatch settings, and collecting provider feedback tied to service execution.

catalog_seed_entries.title: Assets API
catalog_seed_entries.summary: Asset and equipment APIs for retrieving location assets, attaching assets to work orders, updating asset master data, tracking asset history, and recording asset meter readings.

service-providers.name: Service Providers
service-providers.description: Work order, dispatch, field service, contractor coordination, and repair management APIs for operational support workflows.

row_defaults.industry_description: Work order, dispatch, field service, contractor coordination, and repair management APIs for operational support workflows.
